response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 82
REASON: The document mixes genuine legal principles (ADEA covers age 40+, 20+ employees, disparate impact standard, reasonable factor other than age defense) with fabricated specifics — the EEOC Compliance Manual does not have a "Section 8: Age Discrimination, Effective February 2018" in this form, and the specific language about graduation-year filters, social-platform usage patterns, and recruiting-platform liability appears to be invented or drawn from informal EEOC guidance rather than being an actual compliance manual section.
